This sampling module reduces the training computation.
Pool Sampler: The poll sampler obtains the fine features of foreground objects.
A pool sampler compresses the background region’s remaining feature vectors that provide contextual information.
It performs weighted pooling to get a small number of background features <MATH_094> motivated by double attention operation <REF_101> and bilinear pooling <REF_102>.
